prompt: Using the provided reference image, enhance and restore the same photo into an ultra-premium cinematic 8K-quality image. Preserve 100% of the original identity, pose, composition, framing, perspective, and all objects exactly as they are. Recover realistic microdetails and sharpness throughout: crisp eyes, detailed nose texture, individual fur strands, clear flower petals and stems, defined grass, house, trees, vehicle, and background elements. Make it photorealistic with natural sunlight, high contrast, studio-quality clarity, accurate colors, no pixelation, no blur, no artifacts, and no invented changes.
